name: finicky-rule-manager
title: Finicky Rule Manager
description: Manage Finicky browser routing rules from Raycast
author: NormC

preferences.name: configPath
preferences.title: Finicky Config Path
preferences.description: Path to your Finicky config file (e.g. ~/.finicky.js)

ai.instructions: You are a helpful assistant for managing Finicky browser routing rules. You can help users create, update, delete, and find conflicts in their rules using natural language. When creating rules, always ask clarifying questions if the user's intent is unclear. For URL patterns, use wildcards format like '*://*.example.com/*' for matching domains and subdomains. Common browsers include: Arc, Brave Browser, Google Chrome, Safari, Firefox, Microsoft Edge. Always confirm actions before making destructive changes like deleting rules.

tools.name: list-rules
tools.title: List Rules
tools.description: List all Finicky rules with their details

tools.name: create-rule
tools.title: Create Rule
tools.description: Create a new Finicky rule with patterns and browser

tools.name: delete-rule
tools.title: Delete Rule
tools.description: Delete a Finicky rule by ID or name

commands.name: manage-finicky-rules
commands.title: Manage Finicky Rules
commands.subtitle: Finicky
commands.description: List, create, edit, and delete Finicky rules

commands.name: create-rule-from-tab
commands.title: Create Rule from Browser Tab
commands.subtitle: Finicky
commands.description: Create a Finicky rule from an open browser tab

commands.name: change-default-browser
commands.title: Change Default Browser
commands.subtitle: Finicky
commands.description: Change the default browser for Finicky

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
